creator: henrich@crh.cl.msu.edu
text:
The package management took (pkg_manage) doesnt seem to handle the percent 
complete bar well.  In some cases it just keeps going way over 100% (as the
number tracks a >100% as well) IN others it seems to start at 200%.

The pkg_manage tool should also if at all possible figure out what requires
what and install those packages first if they are in the install list.

How-To-Repeat: 
Run pkg_manage with a set of packages..
